title: [AI5] Register New Telegram Bot with BotFather
summary: BotFather registration requires an interactive Telegram account flow that is not available to the local autonomous runner. While inspecting the Telegram surface, removed unsafe hardcoded token fallbacks from the Telegram MCP daemon/server and documented env-only configuration.

required_inputs: new bot token stored as TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN in the operator-controlled secret source

checks.command: git diff --check -- apps/telegram-mcp/bot_daemon.py apps/telegram-mcp/server.py apps/telegram-mcp/README.md apps/telegram-mcp/.env.example

checks.notes: No hardcoded Telegram token pattern remains under apps/telegram-mcp.

checks.command: initialize Telegram MCP server and call get_bot_info without TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
checks.notes: Server initializes and returns a structured unavailable-token/dependency response instead of using a fallback secret.

next_steps: Create the replacement bot through BotFather in the operator Telegram account.
Store the resulting token as TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN without committing it to the repository.
Run apps/telegram-mcp/bot_daemon.py and the MCP get_bot_info tool against the new token, then replace this blocked evidence with verified registration evidence.
